requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for Papua New Guinea PV Inverter Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——巴布亚新几内亚光伏逆变器项目的IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——巴布亞紐幾內亞光伏逆變器項目的IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列證據

summary.en: Papua New Guinea does not publish a confirmed standalone PV-inverter EMC technical regulation equivalent to a dedicated mandatory product scheme in the public sources used for this dataset. In practice, EMC evidence for grid-connected or project-financed solar PV inverters should be prepared against IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series harmonic, immunity, and emissions standards. NISIT is the national standards body, ICCC is the consumer and competition regulator, and PNG Power or the project owner may require EMC evidence as part of grid-connection, procurement, or commissioning documentation. Australia/New Zealand influence in electrical practice means project specifications may reference IEC or AS/NZS-derived EMC expectations.
summary.zh: 本数据集所用公开来源未确认巴布亚新几内亚存在等同于专门强制产品制度的独立光伏逆变器EMC技术法规。实务上，并网或项目融资太阳能光伏逆变器的EMC证据应按光伏功率变换设备IEC 62920以及适用的IEC 61000系列谐波、抗扰度和发射标准准备。NISIT为国家标准机构，ICCC为消费者和竞争监管机构，PNG Power或项目业主可能在并网、采购或调试文件中要求EMC证据。受澳大利亚/新西兰电气实践影响，项目规格可能引用IEC或AS/NZS衍生EMC要求。
summary.zht: 本資料集所用公開來源未確認巴布亞紐幾內亞存在等同於專門強制產品制度的獨立光伏逆變器EMC技術法規。實務上，併網或項目融資太陽能光伏逆變器的EMC證據應按光伏功率轉換設備IEC 62920以及適用的IEC 61000系列諧波、抗擾度和發射標準準備。NISIT為國家標準機構，ICCC為消費者和競爭監管機構，PNG Power或項目業主可能在併網、採購或調試文件中要求EMC證據。受澳洲/紐西蘭電氣實務影響，項目規格可能引用IEC或AS/NZS衍生EMC要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility standards, including harmonic current emissions and immunity tests as applicable
NISIT standards adoption and project-specific procurement requirements
PNG Power Ltd or project-owner EMC documentation requirements

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly generated under GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic test methods, with testing performed by CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports can help describe the product baseline but are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-series EMC evidence requested by Papua New Guinea utilities, owners, donors, or EPCs. Test reports obtained under China nominal voltage conditions must be reviewed against Papua New Guinea's 240/415 V, 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依据GB/T 37408-2021及相关国内测试方法形成，并由CNAS认可实验室测试。这些报告可用于说明产品基线，但不能自动替代巴布亚新几内亚电力公司、业主、出资方或EPC要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列EMC证据。在中国标称电压条件下取得的测试报告，应按巴布亚新几内亚240/415 V、50 Hz供电条件进行复核。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依據GB/T 37408-2021及相關國內測試方法形成，並由CNAS認可實驗室測試。這些報告可用於說明產品基線，但不能自動替代巴布亞紐幾內亞電力公司、業主、出資方或EPC要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列EMC證據。在中國標稱電壓條件下取得的測試報告，應按巴布亞紐幾內亞240/415 V、50 Hz供電條件進行覆核。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited China domestic EMC test reports

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408 EMC reports do not by themselves satisfy IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 evidence expectations for Papua New Guinea projects. Exporters should prepare model-specific IEC 62920 EMC type-test reports and applicable IEC 61000 harmonic and immunity evidence, then confirm whether PNG Power, the project owner, donor, or EPC requires retesting or engineering justification for operation at 240/415 V rather than China's 220/380 V. For mining, LNG, island, and microgrid sites, also confirm project-specific power-quality and generator-interaction limits.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T 37408 EMC报告本身不满足巴布亚新几内亚项目对IEC 62920或IEC 61000证据的预期。出口商应准备针对具体型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告及适用IEC 61000谐波和抗扰度证据，并确认PNG Power、项目业主、出资方或EPC是否要求针对240/415 V而非中国220/380 V运行条件重新测试或提供工程论证。对于矿业、LNG、岛屿和微电网站点，还应确认项目特定电能质量和发电机相互作用限值。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T 37408 EMC報告本身不滿足巴布亞紐幾內亞項目對IEC 62920或IEC 61000證據的預期。出口商應準備針對具體型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告及適用IEC 61000諧波和抗擾度證據，並確認PNG Power、項目業主、出資方或EPC是否要求針對240/415 V而非中國220/380 V運行條件重新測試或提供工程論證。對於礦業、LNG、島嶼和微電網站點，還應確認項目特定電能品質和發電機相互作用限值。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent; commonly mandatory where required by PNG Power, NISIT-adopted standards, donor procurement rules, EPC specifications, or project-owner grid-quality requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or certification-scheme dependent under China domestic PV inverter practice; not automatically transferable to Papua New Guinea

source.publisher: National Institute of Standards and Industrial Technology (NISIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China-only GB/T 37408 EMC reports as Papua New Guinea project evidence. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports for the exact inverter model and confirm whether 240/415 V operation, weak-grid sites, or generator-backed microgrids require additional EMC or power-quality validation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将仅基于中国GB/T 37408的EMC报告作为巴布亚新几内亚项目证据。请为具体逆变器型号准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000报告，并确认240/415 V运行、弱电网站点或发电机后备微电网是否需要额外EMC或电能质量验证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將僅基於中國GB/T 37408的EMC報告作為巴布亞紐幾內亞項目證據。請為具體逆變器型號準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000報告，並確認240/415 V運行、弱電網站點或發電機後備微電網是否需要額外EMC或電能品質驗證。
